expectations.text: uses_chartjs: Does the HTML use Chart.js (not CSS-only bars)?
expectations.evidence: chart.js@4.4.0 loaded via CDN; `new Chart(ctx, { type: 'bar', ... })` instantiated in script

expectations.text: all_six_months: Are all 6 months (1〜6月) present in the chart data?
has_pptx_export: Is there a PPTX export button or function?
expectations.evidence: pptxgenjs@3.12.0 loaded; `initPPTXExport({ filename: '月別売上推移.pptx', ... })` called in animation.onComplete

expectations.text: animation_pptx_timing: Is initPPTXExport or canvas.toDataURL called inside animation.onComplete?
